title: One quiet moment at sunset
summary: Describe one ordinary sunset moment that stayed in your memory.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about one quiet sunset moment you remember. Describe where you were, what you saw, and how you felt. Use past simple.
hintStarters: Last summer, I stood on a roof in…
sampleText: Last summer, I stood on a roof in Cairo just before the sun went down. I was alone. The sky was orange and pink at the same time. I could see many rooftops below me, all flat and dusty. A warm wind came across the city. I could hear the call to prayer from a far mosque. In the distance, the river was a long silver line. I did not move. I did not take a photo. I just stood still and I looked. For five minutes, I forgot my phone, my work, and my plans for the evening. I felt very small but also very calm. The sun went down slowly, and then the lights of the city came on. I went down the stairs to my room. I did not tell anybody about that moment. I still remember the colour of the sky. A quiet moment can stay with you for years.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: remember the colour of the sky

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Past simple to describe a scene
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Để vẽ lại một khoảnh khắc đã qua, dùng quá khứ đơn cho từng chi tiết: 'The sky was orange', 'A warm wind came', 'I could hear', 'I felt very small'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: To paint a past moment, use the past simple for each detail: 'The sky was orange', 'A warm wind came', 'I could hear', 'I felt very small'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: 'could' for past ability or sense
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'could' dùng cho khả năng trong quá khứ hoặc cho giác quan: 'I could see many rooftops', 'I could hear the call to prayer'. Sau 'could' luôn là động từ nguyên mẫu.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'could' is used for past ability or senses: 'I could see many rooftops', 'I could hear the call to prayer'. Always use the base verb after 'could'.

sampleTranslationVi: Mùa hè năm ngoái, tôi đứng trên một mái nhà ở Cairo ngay trước khi mặt trời lặn. Tôi đứng một mình. Bầu trời vừa cam vừa hồng cùng lúc. Tôi có thể thấy rất nhiều mái nhà bên dưới, tất cả đều bằng phẳng và đầy bụi. Một ngọn gió ấm thổi qua thành phố. Tôi có thể nghe tiếng gọi cầu nguyện từ một nhà thờ Hồi giáo xa. Phía xa, dòng sông là một đường dài màu bạc. Tôi không cử động. Tôi không chụp ảnh. Tôi chỉ đứng yên và nhìn. Trong năm phút, tôi quên điện thoại, công việc và những kế hoạch buổi tối. Tôi cảm thấy rất nhỏ bé nhưng cũng rất bình yên. Mặt trời lặn từ từ, và sau đó đèn của thành phố bật lên. Tôi đi xuống cầu thang về phòng. Tôi đã không kể với ai về khoảnh khắc đó. Tôi vẫn nhớ màu của bầu trời. Một khoảnh khắc yên tĩnh có thể ở lại với bạn nhiều năm.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I stood on a roof in Cairo'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the place in the first sentence.
Find the short sentence about being alone.

options: Orange and pink at the same time
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The sky was orange and pink at the same time'.

options: The call to prayer from a far mosque
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I could hear the call to prayer from a far mosque'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the sense of hearing sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: What did the river look like?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'the river was a long silver line'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What did the writer NOT do?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I did not take a photo'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the past simple negative.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which past simple sentence is correct?
options: I did not take a photo.
I did not took a photo.
I do not take a photo.
mcQuestions.explanation: Past simple negative: 'did not + base form'. 'did not take'.
mcQuestions.hint: After 'did not', use the base form of the verb.

mcQuestions.prompt: How long did the writer stand still in that special moment?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'For five minutes, I forgot my phone, my work, and my plans for the evening'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the time phrase about forgetting.

options: Very small but also very calm
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I felt very small but also very calm'.

options: I could to see many rooftops.
mcQuestions.explanation: After 'could', use the base verb: 'could see'.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do we remember some ordinary moments for years and forget many important ones? What makes a moment stay with us?
